title: after executing the sql below,the mclient quit
poc:
CREATE TABLE WORKS
    (EMPNUM   CHAR(3) NOT NULL,
     PNUM     CHAR(3) NOT NULL,
     HOURS    DECIMAL(5),
     UNIQUE(EMPNUM,PNUM));

SELECT DISTINCT EMPNUM FROM WORKS WORKSX WHERE NOT EXISTS  (SELECT *  FROM WORKS WORKSY  WHERE EMPNUM = 'E2' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM WORKS WORKSZ   WHERE WORKSZ.EMPNUM = WORKSX.EMPNUM AND WORKSZ.PNUM = WORKSY.PNUM));
key_bug_features: Executing complex nested SELECT queries causes client crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEES (EMPNUM CHAR(3) NOT NULL, NAME VARCHAR(50), SALARY DECIMAL(10,2), PRIMARY KEY(EMPNUM));
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEES (EMPNUM, NAME, SALARY) VALUES ('E1', 'Alice', 50000.00);
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEES (EMPNUM, NAME, SALARY) VALUES ('E2', 'Bob', NULL);
CREATE TABLE PROJECTS (PNUM CHAR(3) NOT NULL, PNAME VARCHAR(50), BUDGET DECIMAL(10,2), UNIQUE(PNUM));
SELECT EMPNUM FROM EMPLOYEES WHERE SALARY > (SELECT AVG(SALARY) FROM EMPLOYEES WHERE SALARY IS NOT NULL);
